title: Lost Horizons
description: This is a side project to Vanilla Adventures + with the main difference being the gameplay and game version!
body:
## What is the purpose of this modpack?
The main focus of this modpack is to allow players more customization of their armor, tools and other equipment! This modpack also introduces a few features that I feel should be a part of vanilla minecraft.
### Examples: 
- [**Easy Magic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic): It's a very simple mod that lets you leave items on the enchantment table and gives it a reroll button so you dont have to go back and forth with a pesky grindstone!
- [**Elytra Trims**](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims): This is a very simple yet really cool mod, it lets you put trims onto an elytra!
- [**Elytra Trinket**](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra_trinket): This mod allows your player to put an elytra into your cape slot! (It also allows you to fly with it too)

## How does it affect gameplay?
These world gen mods dont effect gameplay significantly however they do affect the world gen significantly.
- Overworld gen - ([**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)) and ([**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)) 
- Nether Dimension - ([**Amplified Nether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether)) 
- End Dimension - ([**Nullscape**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape))

You may also notice some performance increases from the library of performance related mods like [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium).

### Other minor gameplay differences:
- [**Comforts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts) - _Adds sleeping bags, hammocks, and more!_
- [**InvMove**](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - _Let's you move with your inventory open!_
- [**Dynamic Lights**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-lights) - _Dropped and held light sources emit light!_

## Visual differences
- [**Distant Horizons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - _Allows massively larger render distances **(mileage may vary PC to PC)**_
- [**Complementary Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - _One of the best looking and most popular shaders available! **(DH Compatible)**_
- [**Complementary Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) + [**Euphoria Patches**](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) - _Complementary reimagined with some modded tweaks to allow for a wider range of visuals!_ **(NOT DH Compatible)**
- [**Bloop Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/shader/bloop-shaders) - _Another good alternative shaderpack to Complementary! **(DH Compatible)**_
- [**Default Dark Mode**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-modehttps://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) - _Gives the game a clean vanilla-like dark mode!_


_This modpack is an additional modpack I am working on alongside [**Vanilla Adventures +**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-adventures-plus) and [**Simply Refreshed**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simply-refreshed)_
